title: Accounting & Bookkeeping Services Mumbai | Virtual Auditor
description: Professional accounting and bookkeeping in Mumbai. CA-supervised, GST-compliant, audit-ready. Monthly packages from Rs 5,000. Call +91-77000 89597.
bodyText:
Looking for accounting and bookkeeping services in Mumbai? Virtual Auditor provides CA-supervised accounting and bookkeeping in Mumbai, led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA). From transaction recording to audit-ready financial statements, we handle your complete accounting function.

What is Accounting & Bookkeeping Services Mumbai | Virtual Auditor?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Complete transaction recording in Tally Prime, Zoho Books, or QuickBooks. Multi-bank reconciliation across all current accounts, CC accounts, and payment gateways. GST-compliant accounting with HSN classification, ITC tracking, and RCM computation. TDS computation, payment, and quarterly return filing (24Q, 26Q, 27Q, 27EQ). Monthly P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, and custom MIS reports. Payroll processing — salary, TDS u/s 192, PF, ESI, Professional Tax (Maharashtra), and bonus. Stock and inventory accounting for trading and manufacturing businesses. Year-end financial statement preparation ready for statutory audit.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for Bookkeeping in Mumbai
  Mumbai's business environment demands accounting that handles complexity — multi-location operations, inter-company transactions, foreign currency dealings, and high-volume trading activity. Virtual Auditor's CA-supervised bookkeeping ensures every transaction is correctly classified, GST-compliant, and TDS-deducted. Our Goregaon West office provides in-person support across Mumbai's western suburbs. We handle industry-specific accounting: trading companies with high-volume purchase/sales, real estate developers with project-wise accounting under ICDS, manufacturing with inventory and cost accounting, and professional services with time-based billing.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Onboarding — accounting system setup, chart of accounts customisation, bank feed integration. Step 2: Daily/weekly transaction processing. Step 3: Monthly reconciliation — bank, vendor, customer, inter-company. Step 4: GST and TDS computation and return-ready data. Step 5: Monthly financial statements by 10th. Step 6: Quarterly review with management. Step 7: Year-end audit preparation.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need bookkeeping in Mumbai? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-77000 89597
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062
  Monthly packages from Rs 5,000. Scale as you grow.

faqs.q: Do you handle TDS compliance along with bookkeeping?
faqs.a: Yes. Our bookkeeping package includes TDS computation on all payments, TDS payment tracking, and quarterly TDS return filing (24Q for salary, 26Q for non-salary, 27Q for foreign payments). TDS certificates (Form 16/16A) are also generated.

faqs.q: Can you handle accounting for a trading company with high volumes?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle trading companies with thousands of monthly invoices — purchase recording, sales accounting, stock reconciliation, and margin analysis. We use Tally Prime for high-volume trading operations with batch-wise import capabilities.

faqs.q: How quickly can you start bookkeeping for my Mumbai business?
faqs.a: We can begin within 3-5 working days after onboarding. If you have a backlog, we handle catch-up bookkeeping in parallel with current-period accounting.
